title: vicia balansae
intro: Vicia balansae, also known as the Balansa vetch or Balansa clover, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China and the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Vicia balansae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Vicia balansae is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink, and its leaves and stems can also be used to make a poultice for topical application.
